tree.name: Ayo Dosunmu
tree.tradeDescription: Trade deadline deal: Timberwolves acquired Ayo Dosunmu and Julian Phillips from Bulls for Rob Dillingham, Leonard Miller, and 4 second-round picks (2026 least favorable DEN/GSW, 2027 via CLE, 2031 most favorable MIN/GSW, 2032 most favorable PHX/HOU)

assetsGivenUp.name: Rob Dillingham
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded a 2030 1st round pick swap right and 2031 unprotected 1st round pick to SAS for Rob Dillingham (#8 overall)
assetsGivenUp.note: Kentucky guard, selected #8 by SAS, traded to MIN

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2031 unprotected 1st round pick, sent to SAS

assetsGivenUp.name: 2030 1st Round Pick Swap
assetsGivenUp.note: Right for SAS to swap 1st round picks with MIN in 2030

assetsGivenUp.name: Leonard Miller
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded UTA 2026 2nd round pick and MIN 2028 2nd round pick to SAS for Leonard Miller (#33)
assetsGivenUp.note: Canadian forward, selected #33 by SAS, traded to MIN on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via UTA
assetsGivenUp.note: Utah's 2026 2nd round pick, acquired from UTA in Feb 9, 2023 Conley 3-team trade (MIN sent D'Angelo Russell to LAL)

assetsGivenUp.name: D'Angelo Russell
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: MIN traded Andrew Wiggins, 2021 1st (top-3 protected, became Jonathan Kuminga), and 2021 2nd (Miles McBride) to GSW for D'Angelo Russell, Jacob Evans, and Omari Spellman
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared cost with other assets from Conley 3-team trade. Russell sent to LAL.

assetsGivenUp.name: Andrew Wiggins
assetsGivenUp.note: Kansas forward, 2014 #1 overall pick by CLE, traded to MIN on draft night

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#7)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2021 1st (top-3 protected), conveyed as #7 to GSW

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 2nd Round Pick (#36)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2021 2nd round pick, sent to GSW

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Minnesota's own 2028 2nd round pick, sent to SAS for Miller

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick (least favorable DEN/GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Least favorable of Denver or Golden State 2026 2nd round picks. Exact provenance of individual picks accumulated through multiple trades.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via CLE
assetsGivenUp.note: Cleveland's 2027 2nd round pick. Exact acquisition trade unverified on BBRef.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick (most favorable MIN/GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Most favorable of Minnesota's own or Golden State's 2031 2nd round picks. GSW 2031 2nd swap right acquired in Jul 6, 2024 Kyle Anderson 6-team trade (MIN sent Kyle Anderson to GSW). Base pick is MIN's own.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2032 2nd Round Pick (most favorable PHX/HOU)
assetsGivenUp.note: Most favorable of Phoenix or Houston 2032 2nd round picks. Exact acquisition trade unverified on BBRef.
